workflow_rationale: New gameplay feature: gauge-based component activation loop. Requires new POCO manager, modifications to existing components, and new UI controller. Single-service (Unity game) but multi-layer (core logic, component integration, UI).

phases.name: Core Charge System
phases.description: Create ComponentChargeManager POCO class and add ActionBus infrastructure for charge events. This is the foundation that all other phases depend on.

subtasks.description: Add BrickGame_ComponentChargeChanged ActionId and ComponentChargePayload to the ActionBus messaging system
subtasks.notes: Added BrickGame_ComponentChargeChanged ActionId enum value after BrickGame_GameEnded. Added ComponentChargePayload readonly struct with PlayerID (int), ComponentID (string), CurrentCharge (float), MaxCharge (float), Ratio (float) fields. Follows existing payload patterns. Committed as 7837a21.

verification.instructions: Verify IAction.cs has new ActionId and payload struct. Check: enum value exists, payload implements IActionPayload, constructor initializes all fields.

subtasks.description: Create ComponentChargeManager.cs POCO class that tracks Bomb (100) and Harvest (150) gauges per player, charges from brick destruction score (10%), and publishes gauge changes via ActionBus
subtasks.notes: Created ComponentChargeManager.cs POCO class with all required methods: OnBrickDestroyed() (10% charge rate), CanUseComponent() (checks gauge >= max), ConsumeCharge() (resets to 0), GetChargeRatio() (0.0-1.0), GetCurrentCharge(), Reset(). Constants: BOMB_MAX_CHARGE=100f, HARVEST_MAX_CHARGE=150f, CHARGE_RATE=0.10f. Per-player Dictionary<int, ChargeState> tracking. Publishes BrickGame_ComponentChargeChanged via ActionBus. Committed as bfd1512.

verification.instructions: Verify ComponentChargeManager.cs exists with: OnBrickDestroyed(), CanUseComponent(), ConsumeCharge(), GetChargeRatio(), Reset() methods. Constants match spec (Bomb=100, Harvest=150, 10% rate).

phases.name: Game Loop Integration
phases.description: Wire ComponentChargeManager into BrickGameManager, modify MapComponentManager to gate on charge, and update BombComponent/HarvestComponent for gauge-based activation.

subtasks.description: Wire ComponentChargeManager into BrickGameManager as sub-manager (Managers.Game.BrickGame.Charge). Initialize in constructor, call OnBrickDestroyed from AddScore(), reset on StartGame/RestartGame.
subtasks.notes: Wired ComponentChargeManager into BrickGameManager. Added: (1) private _chargeManager field, (2) public Charge accessor property, (3) initialization in constructor, (4) OnBrickDestroyed(waveValue, 0) call in AddScore(), (5) Reset() calls in both StartGame() and RestartGame(). Committed as f9b2528.

verification.instructions: Verify BrickGameManager has Charge property. Verify OnBrickDestroyed called from AddScore with correct playerID. Verify Reset called on game start/restart.

subtasks.description: Modify MapComponentManager.Use() to check ComponentChargeManager gauge before allowing component activation, and consume charge after successful use
subtasks.notes: Modified MapComponentManager.Use() to integrate ComponentChargeManager gauge checking. Flow: (1) Get component, return false if null. (2) Get chargeManager via Managers.Game?.BrickGame?.Charge. (3) If chargeManager exists: check CanUseComponent() → component.Use() → ConsumeCharge(). (4) Fallback when chargeManager is null: use original component.CanUse logic. Committed as 9466b27.

verification.instructions: Verify Use() checks gauge before activation. Verify charge consumed after use. Verify fallback when chargeManager is null.

subtasks.description: Update BombComponent for gauge-based activation: simplify CanUse to IsActive only (gauge check done externally), remove cooldown from Use()
subtasks.notes: BombComponent updated for gauge-based activation. Changes: (1) CanUse simplified to _isActive only, (2) Use() no longer sets cooldown (gauge consumed by MapComponentManager), (3) OnTick() cooldown countdown removed. All explosion/capture/effect logic unchanged. Committed as 0562bf1.

verification.instructions: Verify CanUse = _isActive only. Verify Use() has no cooldown set. Verify explosion logic unchanged.

subtasks.description: Update HarvestComponent for gauge-based activation: simplify CanUse, remove internal charge logic, update harvest settings to 10 blocks at 1s interval per spec
subtasks.notes: HarvestComponent updated for gauge-based activation. Changes: (1) CanUse simplified to _isActive and not _isHarvesting (removed charge check), (2) Use() no longer resets _currentCharge (charge consumed by MapComponentManager), (3) OnBlockCaptured() no longer calls AddCharge (charging via ComponentChargeManager from brick destruction), (4) OnTick() no longer auto-activates (manual H key via MapComponentManager), (5) blocksPerHarvest=10 and harvestInterval=1.0f per spec (10 blocks at 1 per second = 10s harvest). All harvest/capture/effect logic unchanged. Committed as 19d43bb.

verification.instructions: Verify CanUse = _isActive && !_isHarvesting. Verify OnBlockCaptured does not charge. Verify OnTick does not auto-activate. Verify blocksPerHarvest=10, harvestInterval=1.0f.

phases.name: Gauge UI
phases.description: Create ComponentGaugeUIController and integrate it into BrickGameUIManager to display Bomb/Harvest gauge bars with usable-state indicators.

subtasks.description: Create ComponentGaugeUIController.cs following TerritoryUIController pattern: tracks bomb/harvest gauge ratios, binds to UI Image elements for gauge bars, shows usable state via icon visibility
subtasks.notes: Created ComponentGaugeUIController.cs following TerritoryUIController pattern exactly. POCO class with: State (_bombRatio, _harvestRatio, _bombUsable, _harvestUsable), UI References (Image fills + GameObject icons), Colors (orange bomb, green harvest, white usable), Events (OnBombGaugeChanged, OnHarvestGaugeChanged), BindUI with 4 params (2 required + 2 optional), UpdateBombGauge/UpdateHarvestGauge with change detection, all lifecycle methods (Initialize, Cleanup, Refresh, Reset, UnbindUI), RefreshUI handles fillAmount + color + icon visibility. Committed as 5547ab0.

verification.instructions: Verify file structure matches TerritoryUIController pattern. Verify BindUI, UpdateBombGauge, UpdateHarvestGauge, all lifecycle methods exist.

subtasks.description: Integrate ComponentGaugeUIController into BrickGameUIManager: add as 4th sub-controller, subscribe to BrickGame_ComponentChargeChanged, wire all lifecycle methods
subtasks.notes:
Integrated ComponentGaugeUIController into BrickGameUIManager as 4th sub-controller. Changes:

Sub-Controllers region:
- Added private ComponentGaugeUIController _componentGauge field
- Added public ComponentGaugeUIController ComponentGauge property
- Updated class comment hierarchy

Constructor:
- Added _componentGauge = new ComponentGaugeUIController()
- Updated log message to include ComponentGauge

Initialize/Cleanup:
- Added _componentGauge.Initialize() and _componentGauge.Cleanup()

ActionBus region:
- Added _chargeSubscription field
- Subscribe to BrickGame_ComponentChargeChanged in SubscribeToEvents()
- Dispose _chargeSubscription in UnsubscribeFromEvents()
- Added OnComponentChargeChanged handler that routes bomb/harvest payloads to ComponentGaugeUIController

Sync:
- Added SyncComponentGauges() helper that reads from Managers.Game?.BrickGame?.Charge
- Called from SyncInitialScores() for initial state sync

Public API:
- Added _componentGauge.Refresh() in RefreshAll()
- Added _componentGauge.Reset() in Reset()

Committed as 8887395.

verification.instructions: Verify ComponentGauge property added. Verify ActionBus subscription. Verify all lifecycle methods include _componentGauge.

phases.name: Compile Validation
phases.description: Verify all changes compile without errors and the full charge-use loop is logically connected end-to-end.

subtasks.description: End-to-end code review: verify all modified files for compile correctness, confirm the full loop is connected (brick destroy -> charge -> gauge full -> key press -> activate -> reset -> UI update), check all ActionBus pub/sub pairs match

verification.instructions:
Verify complete loop:
1. Brick destroyed -> BrickGameManager.AddScore -> ComponentChargeManager.OnBrickDestroyed -> gauge increments
2. ComponentChargeManager publishes BrickGame_ComponentChargeChanged -> BrickGameUIManager receives -> ComponentGaugeUIController updates
3. Gauge full -> ComponentChargeManager.CanUseComponent returns true
4. B/H key -> Input_UseMapComponent -> (MP: ServerRpc ->) MapComponentManager.Use -> checks gauge -> component.Use() -> ConsumeCharge -> gauge resets -> UI updates
5. All ActionId/Payload types match between publish and subscribe
6. No compile errors (check using statements, type references, method signatures)

subtasks.notes: End-to-end code review completed. All 8 files verified for compile correctness. Full charge-use loop confirmed connected: brick destroy -> charge gauge (10% of score) -> ActionBus publish -> UI update -> gauge full -> B/H key input -> ServerRpc -> MapComponentManager.Use() -> gauge check -> component.Use() -> ConsumeCharge -> gauge reset -> UI reset. All ActionBus pub/sub pairs match (ActionId + Payload type). All string IDs consistent ("bomb"/"harvest"). No compile errors found.

parallel_groups.reason: Both depend only on phase-1-charge-system. Phase 2 modifies game logic files, Phase 3 modifies UI files - no overlapping files.

parallelism.speedup_estimate: Sequential recommended - single Unity project, file dependencies within phases

acceptance_criteria: All C# files compile with 0 errors
Brick destruction charges Bomb gauge (10% of score toward 100)
Brick destruction charges Harvest gauge (10% of score toward 150)
B key triggers Bomb when gauge is full
H key triggers Harvest when gauge is full
Gauge resets to 0 after component use
UI shows gauge bars for Bomb and Harvest
UI shows usable state when gauge is full

verification_steps.name: Compile Check
verification_steps.command: Manual Unity compile check - open project and verify 0 errors in Console

verification_steps.name: Code Review
verification_steps.command: Review all modified files for logical correctness
verification_steps.expected_outcome: All ActionBus publish/subscribe pairs match, all method calls are valid

verification_strategy.reasoning: Unity project without CI pipeline - manual compile verification required. Medium risk due to modifying existing component behavior (BombComponent cooldown removal, HarvestComponent charge removal).

checks: All C# files have valid syntax

tests_passed.compile_verification: PASS - all type references, method signatures, using statements verified

issues_found.title: Gauge consumed when HarvestComponent is busy
issues_found.fix_required: Optional - add component.CanUse check in chargeManager path

issues_found.title: Dead code in HarvestComponent
issues_found.fix_required: Optional - remove unused charge fields if interface updated
